sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime, nullable_date Nullable(DateTime));
SELECT id, toWeek(event_date, IF(nullable_date IS NULL, 0, 1) OR toWeek(nullable_date)) AS week_number FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toWeek(event_date) AS week0, toWeek(event_date, 3) AS iso_week FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toWeek(event_date, 2) AS week_containing_jan1 FROM test_dates WHERE NULL OR event_date >= '2023-01-01';
SELECT id, toWeek(event_date, 4) AS week4, NULL AS dummy FROM test_dates GROUP BY week4 HAVING count(*) OR week4 > 0;
SELECT id, event_date, toWeek(event_date, 5) AS week5_count FROM test_dates WHERE (event_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31') OR event_date IS NULL;
SELECT id, toWeek(event_date, CASE WHEN event_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS week_case FROM test_dates;

SELECT id, event_date, toWeek(event_date, NULLIF(toWeek(event_date, 2), 0)) AS week_num_nullif FROM test_dates JOIN (SELECT id, toWeek(event_date, 3) AS iso_week FROM test_dates) sub ON sub.id = test_dates.id;
SELECT id, event_date, toWeek(event_date, 1) AS week1, toWeek(event_date, 3) AS week3 FROM test_dates WHERE (NULL OR event_date <= '2023-12-31') ORDER BY event_date;
